display_name: To establish the protagonist's protective nature and secure his new s...

field_values.scene_title: To establish the protagonist's protective nature and secure his new s...
field_values.action_summary:
A warrior attempts to execute the wounded Watch-thing. The protagonist intervenes physically, striking the warrior to protect his beast. He then departs the building with Sola and his guardian, having secured allies.

**Participating Characters:**
- The Protagonist
- Sola
- Martian Warrior (Aggressor)
- The Watch-thing
field_values.emotional_beat:
Tension $\rightarrow$ Defiance $\rightarrow$ Somber relief/Resolution.

**Likely Visual Coverage Families:**
- Close-up on the protagonist's hand/strike against the warrior.
- Wide shot of the group exiting into the plaza.
- Tracking shot following the protagonist and Sola.
location_requirements: Interior chamber leading out to a Plaza
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: The physical state of the Watch-thing (is it able to walk?)
the movement from interior light to exterior Martian light.
field_values.transition_notes:
